reference: I am a fifteen-year-old African American teenage girl with a Body Mass Index between thirty-two and thirty-five. Sometimes when I take a shower, I get a dizzy feeling after maybe six to eight minutes of showering. I also experience shortness of breath and my hands shake. I feel absolutely miserable while this is happening, and today I had to hurry up and finish for fear that I might faint. What is happening to me?
text: I hope you will accompany me often as a necromancer.
